name: Multi-agent office
desc: Every agent session gets its own desk — when a floor fills up, a new floor opens automatically

name: Multi-floor office
desc: Hop between floors with `PageUp`/`PageDown`, `↑`/`↓`, or `j`/`k` — each switch slides into view

name: Office spaces
desc: Cubicles, a meeting lounge, and a pantry — the office is laid out in distinct furnished zones, not just a grid of identical desks

name: Animated characters
desc: Coworkers type, wait with a `?`, sleep under little z's, and walk A\*-routed paths between desks

card.blurb: everyone types, waits with a '?', naps under z's, and walks A*-routed paths between desks.

name: Team palette
desc: Shirt and pants take their colors from the working directory — same repo, same colors, so the room reads like an org chart. Hair and skin vary per agent; 16 curated outfits

card.blurb: shirt and pants colored by working directory — same repo, same colors: the room reads like an org-chart.

name: Per-tool monitor glow
desc: Each desk's monitor glows with the tool in use — Edit blue, Bash orange, Read cyan — so you can read the whole room at a glance

card.blurb: edit glows blue, bash orange, read cyan — you can read the room from across the floor.

name: Token meter
desc: Paper stacks up on a desk as its session burns tokens — the pile climbs through 250K / 2M / 16M tiers, a big spend drops a fresh sheet, and hovering shows the exact total (Σ)

card.blurb: paper piles up on a desk as its agent burns tokens — a big spend drops a sheet onto the stack; hover for the exact Σ total.

name: Hover tooltips
desc: Hover an agent for session duration, tool-call count and active-time %; hover any furniture — desks, sofas, plants, vending machine, printer — for its name

card.blurb: hover a coworker for session length, tool-call count and active-time %, or any desk or plant for its name.

name: Agent tree dashboard
desc: Tab opens a collapsible tree of every floor's agents — each badged with the CLI it runs, color-tinted by what it's doing, with tool-call counts

name: Coffee run
desc: Idle agents visit the pantry, carry a cup back to their desk. Cup stays while you work; taken on exit

card.blurb: idle agents fetch a coffee from the pantry and carry it back — the cup stays till they leave.

name: Pantry chitchat
desc: When two or more idle coworkers gather at the same spot — say, the pantry — speech bubbles pop up with little dev jokes

name: Office pets
desc: A cat or dog (one per floor) roams desks, pantry, sofas; sleeps near idle agents. Click to pet — pixel-art hearts float up

name: OpenClaw gateway mascot
desc: A live OpenClaw gateway shows up as a wandering lobster — the way it moves shows the gateway's health

name: Office vibes
desc: The sun and moon cross the skyline as the day goes by, weather rolls past the windows — rain, storm, snow, fog, overcast, windy, smog — and six themes give the office a whole new look

name: Lofi soundtrack
desc: A lofi soundtrack synthesized entirely in code — no audio files shipped. Day and night tracks follow the office's clock and weather, typing sounds swell with activity, and the door chime, printer and vending machine play as coworkers come and go. `m` mutes, `+`/`-` volume

card.blurb: a lofi soundtrack, synthesized live in code, follows the office's clock and weather — hear it: the ♩ toggle in the corner of this page.

name: Floating desktop window
desc: `pixtuoid floating` opens the office in a frameless, always-on-top window — on your desktop, not just in your terminal

name: Hook-safe
desc: The tiny hook shim pixtuoid installs always exits 0 — even a stuck office can never block your agent

card.blurb: the hook shim always exits 0 — a stuck office can never block the agent it's watching.
